email_body:
Beste heer Meeus,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Junior Digital Inhouse Marketing bij Krachtig Online. Uw intensieve opleiding van 4 maanden en de focus op groei spreken mij enorm aan.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en bouw ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). Ik werk zelfstandig, leer snel en ben gemotiveerd om mij verder te ontwikkelen in online marketing.

Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, heb een rijbewijs B en spreek Nederlands op B1-niveau (met lessen bezig). Ik ben beschikbaar vanaf 3 augustus 2026.

Graag stuur ik mijn CV, motivatiebrief en portfolio mee. Ik hoop op een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groeten,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Mr. Meeus,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Junior Digital Inhouse Marketing position at Krachtig Online. Your intensive 4-month training and focus on growth appeal to me greatly.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build WordPress sites. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience with structured data and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). I work independently, learn quickly, and am motivated to further develop in online marketing.

I live in Zwijndrecht, have a driving license B, and speak Dutch at B1 level (taking lessons). I am available from August 3, 2026.

I am happy to send my CV, cover letter, and portfolio. I hope to meet for an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer Meeus,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Junior Digital Inhouse Marketing bij Krachtig Online. Uw bedrijf spreekt mij aan door de focus op groei, het jonge team en de uitgebreide opleiding van 4 maanden. Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn carrière in online marketing uit te bouwen en wil graag meegroeien met uw organisatie.

Momenteel werk ik als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto, waar ik verantwoordelijk ben voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk zelfstandig en georganiseerd, ook in drukke periodes. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data, entity-optimalisatie en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). Dit sluit mooi aan bij uw wens om te groeien in content, grafisch werk, advertising en SEO.

Ik heb oog voor detail, ben creatief en leer snel. Ik kan foto’s en video’s bewerken met Canva en AI-tools. Uw aanbod van flexibele uren, 32 verlofdagen en een aantrekkelijk verloningspakket motiveert mij extra. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, heb een rijbewijs B en ben bereid om op locatie in de Kempen en Limburg te werken. Mijn Nederlands is B1, maar ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn portfolio en motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groeten,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Mr. Meeus,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Junior Digital Inhouse Marketing position at Krachtig Online. Your company appeals to me because of the focus on growth, the young team, and the extensive 4-month training. I am motivated to build my career in online marketing and would like to grow with your organization.

Currently, I work as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, where I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blog content, and building and maintaining WordPress sites. I work independently and in an organized manner, even during busy periods. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience with structured data, entity optimization, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). This aligns well with your desire to grow in content, graphic work, advertising, and SEO.

I have an eye for detail, am creative, and learn quickly. I can edit photos and videos using Canva and AI tools. Your offer of flexible hours, 32 vacation days, and an attractive compensation package motivates me extra. I live in Zwijndrecht, have a driving license B, and am willing to work on location in Kempen and Limburg. My Dutch is B1, but I am taking lessons to improve.

I look forward to further explaining my portfolio and motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- On-page SEO, keyword research, and content writing for client websites (Episto)
- WordPress site building and maintenance (Elementor, Astra)
- Structured data, GEO/AEO, and technical SEO audits (mirook.com)
- Social media integration and content management
- B1 Dutch, taking lessons; driving license B; available from August 2026
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in SEO, content creation, and WordPress development. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build/maintain client websites. On my own project mirook.com, I applied structured data, entity optimization, and GEO audits to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable with content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting. Quick to learn new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch B1 (currently taking classes).

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
